review_text: I had to rearrange a workshop for 8 people at short notice. The flexibility of Spaces was very helpful in this regard, and fortunately, they were still available. The premises of Spaces are located in the center of Geneva on the island in the Rhone and are easily accessible on foot or by public transportation. The staff was very friendly and helpful. The workshop room on the 1st floor was well-equipped with everything we needed for our workshop. The opening hours at 9 am could be a bit earlier.
Wonderful location at the waterfront, close to the station. We very much enjoyed our event hosted at Spaces in Geneva yesterday.

I love this co-working space! It is centrally located, the main floor has glass windows all around and the view is very pleasant. It's very easy to get to with the train right across from it. The community is amazing. The space is beautiful and it is great value for its location.

Beware of their automated billing system, which will charge you for services and deposits that you don't necessarily owe. The coworking spaces are very nice and there is a good atmosphere, but the management is really terrible.
Very good ambience, quality of meeting rooms and the service provided, we truly enjoy our Association home in Satellite office.
It's the best place for work and meetings in Geneva. But the most important - atmosphere and coffee!

Love this place! As I work from home most of the time, this place has been my second home. There isn't a thing that I like about this coworking space: center of Geneva, spacious, beautiful, clean and the staff is really welcoming. It's the perfect environment to focus and have some work done!

An amazing coworking spot right next to Geneva's Cornavin train station. The space is bright, modern, and perfect for getting work done, with fast Wi-Fi and comfortable desks. The staff are welcoming, and the atmosphere is professional yet friendly.
Located in the heart of Geneva, we have spent two years at Multiburo Confédérations, and we are very happy about the quality service provided during that time.
A very clean and quiet place for anyone who needs to work in a shared office space.

Spaces Nations has been one of the most valuable places for my work since I arrived in Geneva. The location is great: easy access by public transportation, parking options, and close to the lake and the botanical garden for a quick break. Being right next to the United Nations and the city center also makes it convenient for meeting clients and partners.

I couldn't recommend this Spaces highly enough. The ladies on front desk are outstanding. For me, the location is sublime - 2 minutes to the park and lake front. It's a friendly, welcoming and warm environment and I would highly recommend this Spaces to those looking for a social but productive working environment.
Cozy coworking space, perfect to settle in and focus. Location near the lake is a huge plus if you want to go on walks during breaks.

Strategic location. Few mins walk from the train station, the lake, and the botanical garden. Big lounge area. Ideal for co-working, small informal meetings, but also quiet enough to get the work done. Latte machine. Not all Spaces have this thing! Hidden gem: small terrace upstairs.
Excellent business center with impeccable maintenance and superb management. Professional, attentive service and pristine facilities make this an outstanding workspace choice.

A hidden gem in Geneva's heart, Signature by Regus. Stunning design meets top-notch service in this coworking space. Stylish work areas, friendly staff, and a perfect location make it a pleasure to work here.
Absolutely love this coworking space! The environment is professional, welcoming, and perfect for productivity.
Beautiful offices and building. Perfectly located in Geneva.

Great location very near Cornavin station. Love the creative and vibrancy of the space. If you're looking for a great place to work from in the heart of Geneva or community of innovative, entrepreneurial and impact focused people, Impact Hub Geneva is the place for you.

Highly recommended and by far the friendliest co-working space in town. This is the place to go if you are looking for an easy-going and chatty community space to work near the Cornavin Train Station and with unlimited free coffee and tea.
Nice place to gather with social entrepreneurs, lots of events. It's easy to get there but not the best silent place to work in the shared space.

WiFi barely works, so had to hot spot off my phone for the day. Hard stop at 17h is inconvenient, especially for those with stakeholders in different timezones. Pretty poor value at Fr 45 for the day.
love this space. I am here often. Any and every query is replied patiently. Love the vibe, the people - feels like a big family.

Excellent place to work next to MAME cafe, with excellent customer service. The place is quiet, well lit and there are booths for calls. There is a toilet and a small kitchen for coffee tea and to warm food if needed.
Cozy place and super nice spot for work. I recommend this place.
Great atmosphere during the day for doing something on the laptop. As pretty much everyone else is doing the same. They don't allow laptops between 12-2pm.
I've been coming to Les Voisins Plainpalais for over six months now and love the place. Service is great. It's a top spot for academic/business workshops.
My favourite place in Geneva to read and write (and check out cute dogs). Come for the cozy atmosphere (two floors!) and check out the Christmas decorations.
A cozy coffee spot tucked inside a library. There's free wifi making it a great place to study with friends.
Vibes were amazing! Delicious food and drinks, perfect spot to work or catch up with friends.
All Boreal coffee shops are great. This one is a bit bigger than normal, with tables and comfy armchairs for socialising or studying. Great community vibe.
It's full of students working with their laptops, so I suppose it's a nice place to chill. Lots of plugs for laptops/phones. Free Wi-Fi; the password is on the counter.
The coffee shop is awesome. It is in the middle of a library in 1 floor. Wifi is available.
Quality coffee bar up the spiral staircase in the bookstore. There are a bunch of tables if you're planning to stay awhile.
Delicious oatmilk latte. They have plenty of seating inside and out. Relaxed vibe.
Amazing that this library is open to the public. It has some tables for self-reading and studying.
The largest library in town, with a great selection of books in English too and long opening hours.
They have various places to study or read, the staff is very kind and the whole library is very clean and free to visit.

This breathtakingly beautiful library mixes the old world charm with modern amenities. Fantastic place to study. The great reading room is open till 10 pm on weekdays. Staffs are helpful and online catalogue of books and articles are a true gem.
Beautiful library, with great greenery outside. Truly peaceful place to focus.
A gem in Eaux-Vives! Cozy and refined atmosphere is the perfect mix to linger, whether for work, lunch, an afternoon pick-me-up, or a chat with friends.
A nice place. Sitting outside is perfect for reading a book or working.

This is my 3rd office space in the Geneva area, and by far the best. The office consists of people from all over, it's very close to the train station, shopping, dining there's even a gym across the road.
Wonderful place to work from, we can see the mountains, the offices are cosy, modern and comfortable.
Superb coworking center, in the Geneva countryside, magnificent, functional place, perfect for working! Parking spaces are two minutes away.
Perfect coworking space for small and medium-sized businesses, associations, and subsidiaries of large groups. Just 5 minutes from Geneva International Airport.

Atelier 9 is hands down one of the best co-working spaces I've come across between Geneva and Lausanne. Nestled in the upper part of Nyon, just a stone's throw from the castle, it offers a fantastic range of top-tier services at a very reasonable price.

Having moved from London to Nyon and needing a professional, comfortable and clean environment to work from I found and signed up to Atelier 9. The centrally located facilities have fast internet, free beverages, privacy booths and monitors to link up with your laptop. Best part is the community who are friendly and amiable. Highly recommend for entrepreneurs and hybrid workers.

Very unique and elegant yet simple design. Fantastic atmosphere to work. Centrally located with access to beautiful lake front view and next to an excellent cafe with outdoor seating that is also great to relax or work at.
Modern hipster cafe with excellent flat white. Good value for money at CHF5.20.
Very nice place near the train station to chill.
Nice, spacious, pleasant, and quiet place! Just steps from the station!
Excellent welcome, easy access, and the coworking and office space is truly designed for deep work or collaborative work.
Want the best coffee for about 20km? This is the place to go. Nice place to sit outside and watch the world go by.
Definitely the coworking place to be. 1 min walk to the lake, friendly atmosphere, free food, bikes, paddle surf, quiet, clean, serious and nice. The most invaluable is definitely the people there.
Large, well-appointed space ideal for work and, when necessary, relaxation. Just a stone's throw from the lake for a lunch break or an early morning arrival via the docks with the rising sun.
Very nice and cute café in the center. A very cozy atmosphere ideal for meeting with friends or studying. The spacious back room was an ideal study spot.
Hands down the best specialty coffee in Morges. Cozy atmosphere and friendly service.
You can connect to the Wi-Fi, surf the web, and print for 10 cents per copy.
This one is my favorite center! Lovely interior design and super friendly environment. The terrace is definitely a cool place to enjoy. Always a good place to network with like minded people.
Very welcoming staff, quiet place to work. Can only recommend it!

I love working here when I'm working from home. It is central and has comfortable chairs and spaces to work from. I can work from home from many different cities and countries - I can only recommend Regus and its offices in Lausanne gare.
The location is super central, making it easy to access by public transport. The working environment is quiet and professional.

Great place to work at! Very conveniently located by the main train station. A wide range of office spaces for different uses, and a large open space which is usually quiet. Open space plan is very affordable.
Great place for start ups. Kind helpful staff, nice office, trendy decor, ecofriendly, great location.

I have worked at the Gotham Co-working space since it opened. The location is perfect - just 2 minutes walk from the Lausanne train station. I also love the interior design, and how it's been designed to function as a co-working hub and a meeting point, but also has quieter areas that are noise-free and private.
Space of innovative productivity, close to the train station. Interesting people and free Wi-Fi. Still need some sort of standing desks in the open space though!
The place to meet in Lausanne central! Super close to the station. Perfect for meetings of all kinds. The atmosphere is friendly and welcoming. And, the coffee is excellent!
Great location right in the heart of Lausanne. The rooms are ideal for isolated or group work, with ambient lighting, beamers, presentation screens, super-fast internet connection.
Great location in Flon. Great place, very welcoming and offering services for all types of workers!
GSM connection is virtually non-existent in the building.
The premises are very spacious and well prepared for work. Inside you have access to almost unlimited space, resting room.
I wanted to find a coworking space that is friendly, with a professional but non-sterile environment. T19 is like a family to me now.
Best place to work in Lausanne. And the fiber helps a lot!
A large, welcoming and beautifully decorated office. The space is equipped with a kitchen, so you can prepare your lunch on-site. The space is quiet and easily accessible by metro.

Great space. You cannot get any more central. The offices have enormous windows with natural light, and in addition to the working spaces, it has two additional communal spaces, one for eating and hanging out with a kitchen, and another for conference calls or meetings.
Super cozy coworking space and one of the best deals in Lausanne, extremely well located in the center. Meeting room, separate kitchen. Perfect.

Super easy to get to with public transportation. Nice amenities like free tea and fruit. The lounge is small and cramped. There is no privacy and no ability to make a call without the whole room hearing it.

This is, by far, the best co-working space in the city! Always has welcoming and helpful staff. Always puts on interesting and varied events on themes of sustainability, innovation, and social impact.
So much more than a coworking space! Impact Hub Lausanne is a community, a support system, plenty of networking opportunities, incubation programs and a great location to host events and meetings.

This place is amazing! Beautifully decorated, clean, well stocked, well lit, relaxed and spacious. Easy online and onboarding/booking process. Lausanne's best co-working secret! Just 10 min from the train station.

A beautiful and incredibly inspiring coworking space! We were able to set up our video editing suite in the meeting room for two months. The best features are the complimentary coffee/tea, the kitchenette, and the super-fast Wi-Fi.
New favorite spot in town! Perfect atmosphere, great for getting some work done. Open-air seating is comfortable and quiet enough to read, catch up with friends, or get some work done.
Hands down the best coffee in Switzerland! A perfect spot for anyone who appreciates exceptional coffee.
The place is nice and cozy. You have plugs if you want to stay in and work. The music is nice, helps you not get bored and stay focused.
Sleepy Bear Coffee was the first specialty coffee shop in Lausanne. It is a very cosy café. The service and the hospitality level is truly outstanding.
Little coffee shop serving good coffee. I went there to study a bit for uni. Quite expensive 5.50 CHF for a cappuccino.
THE hidden gem specialty coffee shop in Lausanne. Perfectly central location, yet quiet. The perfect place for a quick and well-balanced coffee while sending off that last email of the day.
Nice coffee with outdoor seating. The coffee is very good. Kind and smiley service and a nice vibe inside.
Huge selection of books. There is a dedicated quiet-zone space to read, study or work with Wifi.
Small library, nice place to work. A few desk tables available. Great natural light.
Friendly staff and very quiet place to read and study.
Essential in Pully. Deserves to be known.
A lovely coffee shop in Lutry with excellent coffee and service. Small, but perfectly formed.
A lovely cafe with soft and familial atmosphere, with paintings, kids laughing and people playing chess!

The perfect place for work meetings. I spent two days here with ten colleagues. Great meeting rooms and facilities, a very warm welcome from staff and excellent food at lunchtime. The afterwork excursion in the vineyards was absolutely great.
A truly international community in the center of Vevey. The space is placed very close to the rail station and provides complete facilities for working. There is a nice view towards the mountains.
Very nice co-working in the city center of Vevey. Lovely people, fast internet and free coffee. All you need for a great day of work!
A unique experience in a very pleasant and enriching working environment thanks to the sharing of knowledge with all the co-workers.
Firstly, my warm vegan matcha latte was divine. The matcha powder was high-quality and the milk was nicely frothed.
Walked in and asked for wifi and the owner gave me, even before I ordered.
Good place to study, with convenient working hours.
Beautifully designed coworking space, conveniently located next to the train station. Lots of light and all the amenities you might be looking in a place alike.
Beautiful, bright, modern workspace in a fantastic location, literally on the platform of Montreux train station and a 2-minute walk from the lake.
I had a positive experience at this coworking space. The space is well-designed, comfortable, and provides an excellent environment for focus and productivity.
Sleepy Bear Café is conveniently located just a two-minute walk from the train station. Really enjoyed the coffee here.
Exceptional service at this local public library. From the moment you walk through the doors, the staff greets you with a friendly smile. Very inclusive and supportive environment.
If you're a student or adult looking for a quiet place to work, you'll find yourself far from the stereotypical library where silence is golden.
We enjoy coming here. We especially enjoy sitting on their covered pier looking out over Lac Léman.
